surveyComponent.label: Survey component
surveyComponent.labelHelp: The label is the text displayed above or next to the fields if the field type is a question.
surveyComponent.positionHelp: The position is the display order of the component in the list, numeric value only.
surveyComponent.questionTypeHelp: The question type will display the specific field.
surveyComponent.saved: The survey component has been saved
surveyComponent.styleHelp: The style is applied during display. You can use basic CSS or Tailwind classes. Check there are no side effects if you use this style override.
surveyComponent.typeHelp: The question component type will display fields to fill in. The Text type will only display text, useful for explanations.
surveyComponent.valuesHelp: Values are encoded in a list, using ; as separator. Example: cat; dog; mouse
surveyComponent.valuesRequired: A list must contain at least one value
